instruction: Please handle the review email thread in the inbox first. Then check the Singapore board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send manager@example.com a quick update.

Then check the Singapore board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send manager@example.com a quick update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/singapore-review-followup.txt' --content 'Singapore review follow-up handoff note.'
